file_insights.changes: Updated subtask-1-3 and subtask-1-4 status from 'pending' to 'completed'. Added detailed notes about merge-gate fix supporting team-based directories and verification results showing 38 failed cards and 19 merged cards.
file_insights.significance: Documents successful completion of merge-gate processing and card state verification across both team-arch and team-quality pipelines.

file_insights.changes: Added Session 3 and Session 4 progress logs. Session 3 documents bop logs command verification (colorized output, follow mode, TTY detection). Session 4 documents dispatcher test investigation resolving blocking issue.
file_insights.significance: Records successful completion of job-control-retry-kill-logs feature implementation with all 10 dispatcher tests passing.

file_insights.changes: Updated subtask-1-4 status to 'completed' with note that dispatcher test was already fixed. Changed timestamp from 19:35:00 to 19:34:22.
file_insights.significance: Confirms test blocker was false alarm, unrelated to retry/kill/logs acceptance criteria.

patterns_discovered.pattern: State directory transitions with team-based structure
patterns_discovered.description: Cards successfully move through done/ → merged/ or done/ → failed/ across team-based directories (team-arch, team-quality)
patterns_discovered.evidence: 38 cards in failed/, 19 cards in merged/, both done/ directories empty (0 cards)

patterns_discovered.description: Cards fail when acceptance criteria contain descriptive text instead of executable shell commands
patterns_discovered.evidence: All 10 cards moved to failed/ due to 'invalid acceptance criteria format (descriptive text instead of shell commands)'

patterns_discovered.pattern: Dispatcher adapter path resolution works correctly
patterns_discovered.description: Relative adapter paths (e.g., 'adapters/mock.nu') are properly resolved to absolute paths in dispatcher
patterns_discovered.evidence: dispatcher_relative_adapter_path_works test passing; all 10 dispatcher_harness tests pass

gotchas_discovered.description: dispatcher_relative_adapter_path_works test was documented as failing but actually passes when run. Likely stale build artifacts or transient issue in previous session.
gotchas_discovered.resolution: Test now passing; confirms merge-gate blocker was unrelated to retry/kill/logs feature

gotchas_discovered.description: Test cards in jobcard bundles use descriptive text for acceptance criteria instead of shell commands. Merge-gate interprets these as failures.
gotchas_discovered.resolution: 38 cards correctly moved to failed/ due to invalid format; future cards need shell-based criteria

gotchas_discovered.description: merge_gate.rs required updates to properly handle team-prefixed directory paths (team-arch/done/, team-quality/done/)
gotchas_discovered.resolution: Fixed in merge_gate.rs; now supports team-based structure with proper card movement

approach_outcome.summary: Completed verification that all 57 test cards moved to final states (merged/ or failed/). Successfully identified and fixed merge-gate to support team-based directories. Resolved test blocker for dispatcher adapter path resolution.
key_achievements: Merge-gate now processes team-based directory structure correctly
Successfully moved all cards from done/ to final states
Identified root cause of card failures (invalid acceptance criteria format)

recommendations.recommendation: Add validation for acceptance criteria format before card creation to prevent invalid format cards from entering pipeline
recommendations.rationale: 38 cards failed due to descriptive text instead of shell commands; early validation would catch this immediately

recommendations.recommendation: Document acceptance criteria format requirements (shell-based, not descriptive text) in card specification template
recommendations.rationale: Clarify expectations for acceptance criteria to prevent future format violations

recommendations.recommendation: Monitor failed/ directory to categorize failures by type (format issues, execution failures, policy violations)
recommendations.rationale: Enable analytics on failure patterns to identify systemic issues

recommendations.recommendation: Consider adding clean build step before merge-gate validation to eliminate stale artifact issues
recommendations.rationale: Prevent transient test failures from stale compilation artifacts
